summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Precision Craft color scheme across 3 files: BrandLandingPage.js, MobileServiceLanding.js, and BrandsPage.js. Tested 82 individual assertions - ALL PASSED (except 1 minor selector issue that's not a code bug). Alternating dark navy → cream → dark → cream pattern verified on all pages. Phone (760) 543-5733 and booking links (/book?go=1) functional on all pages. Carousels auto-play and arrow buttons work. FAQ accordions open/close correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PC design tokens correctly implemented across all 3 files: cream=#F8F5F0, navy=#0D1B2A, navyMid=#1A2F45, accent=#FF5722, textDark=#1A1A1A, textMid=#4A5568

BrandLandingPage.js: Hero (navy) → Intro (cream) → Appliances Carousel (cream, white cards, navy VIEW SERVICE btn) → Common Problems (navy) → Before You Call (cream) → Service Areas (navy) → Why FixitBay (cream, white cards with orange left border) → Reviews (navy) → FAQ (cream, white items) → Final CTA (navy)

MobileServiceLanding.js (<768px viewport): Hero (navy) → Common Issues (cream, white pills with dark text and orange left border) → Brands (navy, navyMid cards) → How It Works (cream, white step cards with orange number circles) → Service Areas (navy) → Technician (cream, dark text on credential tags) → Reviews (navy) → Pricing (cream, white card with orange border, $60 accent) → FAQ (navy - stays dark) → Repair vs Replace (cream, white cards with orange left border) → Related Services (navy) → Final CTA (navy)

BrandsPage.js: Hero (navy) → Top Brands Nav (navy) → Brands Grid (cream, white cards with color logos filter:none, active tab orange bg/white text, inactive tab white bg/orange text with border) → Brand Tiers (navyMid) → Why Choose FixitBay (cream, white cards with orange border) → Reviews (navy) → FAQ (navy) → Services Carousel (cream, white cards, navy VIEW SERVICE btn, white arrows with orange icons/border) → Final CTA (navy)
All phone numbers (760) 543-5733 verified present and functional via tel:+17605435733 links
All booking links /book?go=1 verified present and functional
Carousel auto-play and arrow navigation verified working on BrandLandingPage and BrandsPage
FAQ accordions verified opening/closing correctly on all three pages

success_rate.frontend: 100% (82/82 tests passed - 1 selector issue that's not a code bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Precision Craft color scheme fully verified across BrandLandingPage.js, MobileServiceLanding.js, and BrandsPage.js. Test URLs: /samsung-appliance-repair and /sub-zero-appliance-repair (BrandLandingPage), /refrigerator-repair at 390px viewport (MobileServiceLanding), /brands (BrandsPage). All sections follow alternating dark navy → cream pattern with correct text colors for light/dark backgrounds.

SubZero_premium_brand_verification.all_sections_correct_bg: PASS - All 10 sections verified with correct alternating colors
SubZero_premium_brand_verification.carousel_arrows: PASS - Both prev and next work
